strings.clearCacheTitle: 🚨 THE TOTAL SYSTEM MELTDOWN: Listen here, parça! Clearing the cache will blow your speakers. Your custom drift themes, your favela slang, and your entire bass-boosted history will be wiped. It’s like the soundwall getting confiscated! Do you want to lose the crown of the Baile?
